languages.text: "Тразин упоминал, что Лария жива и находится в его руках. Вы не хотите ее найти?"
"Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"
languages.original_text: "Тразин упоминал, что Лария жива и находится в его руках. Вы не хотите ее найти?"

traits.locale_text: "Trazyn mentioned Laria being alive and in his hands. Don't you want to find her?"
"Trazyn mentioned Laria being alive and in his hands. Don't you want to find her?"
"Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"
"Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"

languages.text: "Trazyn hat behauptet, Laria wäre am Leben und in seiner Gewalt. Wollt Ihr sie nicht finden?"
languages.original_text: "Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"

traits.locale_text: "Trazyn hat behauptet, Laria wäre am Leben und in seiner Gewalt. Wollt Ihr sie nicht finden?"

languages.text: « D'après Trazyn, Laria serait en vie et sa captive. Ne voulez-vous pas la retrouver ? »
languages.original_text: "Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"

traits.locale_text: « D'après Trazyn, Laria serait en vie et sa captive. Ne voulez-vous pas la retrouver ? »

languages.text: «Trazyn dijo que Laria está viva y en su poder. ¿No quiere recuperarla?».
languages.original_text: "Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"

traits.locale_text: «Trazyn dijo que Laria está viva y en su poder. ¿No quiere recuperarla?».

languages.text: "Trazyn, Laria'nın yaşadığını ve elinde olduğunu iddia etti. Onu bulmak istemiyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"

traits.locale_text: "Trazyn, Laria'nın yaşadığını ve elinde olduğunu iddia etti. Onu bulmak istemiyor musun?"

languages.text: “特拉金说菈丽雅还活着，而且就在他手里。你不想把她找回来吗？”
languages.original_text: "Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"

traits.locale_text: “特拉金说菈丽雅还活着，而且就在他手里。你不想把她找回来吗？”

languages.text: 「トラズンはリアラが生きていると、彼の手にいると主張している。君、彼女を探したいと思わないのか？」
languages.original_text: "Trazyn claimed Laria is alive and in his clutches. Don't you want to find her?"

traits.locale_text: 「トラズンはリアラが生きていると、彼の手にいると主張している。君、彼女を探したいと思わないのか？」
